creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Multiple resource leak issues, uninitialized variables, etc have been identified by Coverity for rpcbind. The issues should be fixed so rpcbind is more robust.

Access to details for Coverity can be found in the committer's guide: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/coverity.html .
